description: Resolve a (handle, slug) pair to its canonical (did, slug) identity and return the package view. EXPERIMENTAL.

main.description: Convenience endpoint that combines handle-to-DID resolution with a package lookup. Useful when the user-facing identifier is `@example.dev/gallery-plugin` rather than a DID. The aggregator MAY cache handle resolution; clients that need authoritative current handle state SHOULD resolve the handle themselves.

errors.name: HandleNotFound
errors.description: The handle could not be resolved to a DID.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No package indexed under the resolved (did, slug).
